web_about: The owners of Amada Senior Care Rancho Cucamonga, Maria and Leonard Navarra , have made it their personal mission to provide the best quality in-home senior care and to assist families in managing their senior loved ones’ care needs. What this means is they identify the precise caregiving solutions to fit the specific requirements of seniors who want to age at home and live their best lives. The hands-on care method employed by the Amada Rancho Cucamonga care team begins with a visit to the senior client’s home to learn about their desires and requirements, assess their living environment and create a customized care plan that is tailored to each senior’s unique situation.

web_faqs: [{"question": "What is hospice care?", "answer": "Hospice care is specialized care that focuses on providing comfort, support, and quality of life for patients with terminal illnesses and their families."}, {"question": "Who is eligible for hospice care?", "answer": "Patients with a terminal illness, typically with a prognosis of six months or less, and who are ready to focus on comfort rather than curative treatments, are eligible for hospice care."}, {"question": "Is hospice care only provided in hospitals?", "answer": "No. Hospice care can be provided at home, in nursing facilities, assisted living centers, and hospitals. In-home hospice is the most common setting."}, {"question": "What services does hospice care include?", "answer": "Hospice care includes pain and symptom management, emotional and spiritual support, caregiver training, respite care, and bereavement support for families."}, {"question": "Does hospice care cover medications and equipment?", "answer": "Yes. Most hospice programs provide medications related to the terminal illness, medical equipment, and supplies needed to ensure comfort and quality of life."}, {"question": "How long can someone receive hospice care?", "answer": "Hospice care can be provided for as long as the patient meets eligibility requirements. Some patients receive care for weeks, while others may receive it for several months."}, {"question": "Can patients continue to see their regular doctors while on hospice?", "answer": "Yes. Patients often continue to see their regular doctors for ongoing care, while the hospice team coordinates to ensure comfort and symptom management."}, {"question": "Is hospice care covered by insurance or Medicare?", "answer": "Most hospice care services are covered by Medicare, Medicaid, and many private insurance plans. Coverage usually includes medications, equipment, and nursing visits related to the terminal illness."}, {"question": "What is the difference between hospice care and palliative care?", "answer": "Palliative care focuses on relief from symptoms and stress at any stage of serious illness, while hospice care is specifically for patients who are nearing the end of life and are no longer seeking curative treatments."}, {"question": "Can hospice care be provided at home?", "answer": "Yes. Home hospice care is the most common setting, allowing patients to receive comfort-focused care in a familiar environment, supported by nurses, aides, and social workers."}, {"question": "What areas does Good Heart Hospice serve?", "answer": "We provide hospice and palliative care services to families in San Bernardino and Riverside."}, {"question": "Does Good Heart Hospice serve other nearby counties as well?", "answer": "Yes, we can serve nearby counties including Los Angeles through our trusted partner Affinity Hospice LLC. web_about: Be Inspired... Create CommUNITY! Each year, hundreds of thousands of participants enjoy the City of Rancho Cucamonga Community Services Department's recreation and special event programs. From newborns to golden years - active to passive - athletic to crafty - our programs offer something for everyone. Creating community through people, parks and programs, the Community Services Department sets a high standard of excellence. We invite you to join us at a Special Event, in a class or workshop, attend a professional theatrical production, visit one of our beautiful community centers or parks - ENJOY all that the City of Rancho Cucamonga has to offer with our programs and services! web_facility_name: UDR Apartments Verano at Rancho Cucamonga Town Square
web_about: Come home to beauty. Verano at Rancho Cucamonga Town Square apartment homes boasts award-winning architecture and stunning grounds. Many of the uniquely designed Tuscan-style buildings have views of the San Gabriel Mountains. Step out and enjoy the Olympic-style pool and spa, or attempt the nine-station fitness trail. With the clear blue sky of southern California overhead, these stylish apartments feature spacious layouts and many thoughtful touches. Plus, Verano’s open-concept floor plans can perfectly accommodate your work-from-home needs. Additional community amenity spaces such as the conference room, pool deck lounge, and on-site retail also make working from home easier than ever! If you're searching for an apartment in Rancho Cucamonga, find your perfect apartment at Verano.
web_description: I'm excited about the apartments I've found at Verano at Rancho Cucamonga Town Square. Stylish amenities. Great location. Professional management. Can't wait to call this place home! Check out the apartments at Verano at Rancho Cucamonga Town Square!

web_faqs: [{"question": "How do I make a booking? + -", "answer": "To make a booking you must first choose your location then the game you wish to play. Click the book now button and you will be taken to choose your players, date and time. Our Gameboxes hold a maximum of 6 players so when making your booking our system will automatically reserve multiple game boxes to accommodate your group size."}, {"question": "What is your cancellation policy? + -", "answer": "Standard tickets can be moved up to 48 hours in advance of the booking time. You can do this yourself via the \"manage my booking\" button on your confirmation email. For changes to bookings less than 48 hours away (or for tickets purchased within the 48-hour period), tickets cannot be rescheduled, and you will not be entitled to a refund or any compensation. We cannot issue refunds or allow rescheduling for non-arrivals. Futhermore, bookings are non-refundable outright. Special packages relating "}, {"question": "Can I change my booking? + -", "answer": "Yes, we are happy for you to move or cancel your booking up to 48 hours in advance of your arrival time. To do this, simply hit the 'Manage My Booking' link found in your order confirmation. Once landed, you can choose a new time or date, or cancel should you wish."}, {"question": "How does pricing work? + -", "answer": "Our pricing is based on a per person, per experience basis and will differ per location. To find pricing information, simply select your game, click 'book now' and explore the different ticket prices and options. The price you may see displayed initially is a 'From £...' price. This is the lowest possible price you could book for. However, once you select a date and time the pricing can change depending on if the venues' peak pricing is in effect. Peak times are pre-determined by the venue's bus"}, {"question": "Are reservations required in advance? + -", "answer": "Although all our venues do accept walk in bookings, due to high demand we do recommend you book in advance to secure your game experience."}, {"question": "What ticket options do you have? + -", "answer": "We offer General Admission (Ages 12+) and Junior (Ages 3-11) as our two standard tickets. We offer discounted tickets Monday - Wednesday* on 60 minute experiences only for Students/Blue Light Card (UK) or Military/College Student (US). *Subject to location."}, {"question": "What is the age suitability? + -", "answer": "We have games suitable for ages 3 and up, but not all games are suitable for young children. PAW Patrol is perfect for families with children aged 3. For families with children aged 5+ we would recommend Angry Birds or our Junior Bundle. All other games are suitable for ages 8+ to adult, with the exception of Squid Game which we recommend for ages 12+. Children under the age of 12 must be accompanied by an adult for the duration of the experience. In our US venues, under 18s will need an adult t"}, {"question": "How many people can play? + -", "answer": "Our Gameboxes hold a maximum of 6 players so when making your booking, if above this number, our system will automatically reserve multiple Gameboxes to accommodate your group size. You will need to spilt your group into teams and you will all play at the same time."}, {"question": "Adding/removing players + -", "answer": "If your group is below 6 you can pay for the additional members upon arrival or email our team to add on the additional players; if over the maximum per room we cannot guarantee availability for the additional guests. You can reduce players and receive a refund for the ticket up until 48 hours prior to your booking by emailing our team on [email protected] . We do not offer refunds for non arrivals."}, {"question": "Will I be put with other people? + -", "answer": "No, you won’t be put in with another group. Bookings are private and you will only be joined in your Gamebox by those you booked to play alongside, even if there’s only 2 of you! *Excluding Manchester Arndale Social Pass"}, {"question": "Are there any physical requirements? + -", "answer": "Immersive Gamebox involves mild physical activity and does not require a specific level of fitness to play. Most disabilities and access requirements, including wheelchair access, can be accommodated for. Some of our games are better suited to certain access requirements than others, so if you need advice, please get in touch before booking and we will help you choose on [email protected] . For any players with photosensitive conditions please be aware that our adventures contain digital project"}, {"question": "Can I store my belongings? + -", "answer": "Use of lockers are available free of charge at all of our venues for storage of bags, coats and non-essential items while you are playing - however we cannot guarantee availability, so please consider this when planning your experience."}, {"question": "What shoud I wear? + -", "answer": "Please wear sensible footwear: flat shoes or trainers, no open toes or heels. web_about: Living at The Reserve at Empire Lakes The newly renovated apartment homes at The Reserve at Empire Lakes have all the convenience and amenities you can ask for, tucked away in a peaceful nook of highly sought-after Rancho Cucamonga. The surrounding area may be fast-paced, but life at The Reserve at Empire Lakes is anything but. Soak in the scenery while sitting poolside, or kick back in our residential game and media rooms. Our state-of-the-art, 24 Hour fitness center is the perfect place to unwind before heading home to your fully equipped apartment, which includes a full-size washer and dryer, air conditioning, a private patio and stunning mountain views that bring the area's peace and serenity right into your living room. Come live the good life at the Reserve at Empire Lakes Apartments
web_description: We're now offering virtual touring and leasing options! The Reserve at Empire Lakes is less than one mile from the Metrolink station and the PGA golf course, Empire Lakes.

To exercise these rights, you can complete and submit the form linked below. Please note that we may require additional information or documentation to verify your identity before processing your request. For more information about how we collect, use, handle, and protect your personal information, please refer to our Privacy policy ."}, {"question": "What is cardiac imaging?", "answer": "Cardiac imaging refers to specialized exams that create detailed images of the heart and blood vessels. These exams help evaluate heart structure, blood flow, plaque buildup, and signs of cardiovascular disease — often before symptoms become serious."}, {"question": "What is the difference between a calcium score and a CCTA?", "answer": "A Coronary Calcium Score measures calcified plaque within the coronary arteries and helps assess overall heart disease risk. A Coronary CTA (CCTA) provides more detailed images of the coronary arteries and can evaluate narrowing, plaque buildup, and blood flow issues within the arteries themselves."}, {"question": "What is AI plaque analysis?", "answer": "AI plaque analysis uses advanced artificial intelligence software to evaluate plaque seen on a CCTA exam. This technology helps identify the amount and type of plaque present, including plaque that may not yet be causing significant blockage. The goal is to provide physicians with deeper insight into cardiovascular risk and support more personalized treatment planning."}, {"question": "Do I need symptoms to have cardiac imaging?", "answer": "Not always. Some cardiac imaging exams may be recommended for patients with risk factors such as: Family history of heart disease High cholesterol High blood pressure Diabetes Smoking history Elevated cardiovascular risk Other exams may be ordered to evaluate symptoms such as chest pain, shortness of breath, dizziness, or irregular heartbeat."}, {"question": "Are cardiac imaging exams invasive?", "answer": "Most cardiac imaging exams offered at RadNet are non-invasive, meaning they do not require surgery or invasive procedures. Many exams are quick, outpatient procedures with little to no downtime."}, {"question": "How long do cardiac imaging exams take?", "answer": "Exam times vary depending on the type of study. Some exams, such as calcium scoring, may take only a few minutes, while more advanced exams like cardiac MRI may take longer.
